# Taylor (NotGreg) — February 17, 2026

**Type:** Cold outreach / Exploratory partnership
**Participants:** Dax, Taylor
**Taylor's Discord:** NotGreg

---

## Who Is Taylor

Taylor is 33, self-employed, and works primarily as a payment processor/banker — he helps entrepreneurs replace Stripe with NMI/Authorized.net and earns lifetime residuals on closed deals. He also consults businesses on revenue and retention. He has a small private bookmaking operation with close friends (Venmo-based) and a forthcoming sportsbook app in beta, though both are explicitly small/private.

He randomly DM'd Dax because he liked the "dgen" server tag and was impressed by DD's branding and server structure. He's a self-described degenerate gambler but not a professional bettor. His sister Hannah (19) is his 50% business partner and virtual assistant.

He's from the Collegeville/Westchester PA area — worked at the Collegeville Best Buy 2014–15. Dax grew up in Collegeville. Small world connection discovered on this call.

---

## What Taylor Brought to the Table

- **Payment processing partnership** — wants to replace DD's Stripe setup with NMI/Authorized.net and pay Dax lifetime residuals
- **Referral income for Dax** — if Dax introduces business owners to Taylor for POS/payment processing, Taylor pays referral fee + lifetime residuals
- **Live music streaming Discord** — building a community around live concerts via an app, wants to either thread announcements into DD or collaborate
- **Discord building help** — wants Dax to advise on how to structure and monetize his server
- **Bookmaking** — briefly mentioned a private portfolio model for students; Dax declined interest

---

## What Was Discussed

- DD's organic growth model (Fliff Discord SEO, Discord listing sites — ~80% of traffic)
- Premium membership: ~50 paying members, never exceeded 150; struggled with retention after free-premium conversions
- Churn problem: members from Fliff SEO were 18-year-olds who lost their money or stopped using Discord
- Staff: previously 10–12, stripped to 6; commission-only model wasn't generating conversions
- EV alert integration from OddsJam + Daily Grind Fantasy — 2,000 alerts/day, filtering to 5–10/sport
- Pricing increase to $50/month coming soon
- Dax gave Taylor full premium access on the call

---

## Dax's Post-Call Notes (from transcript)

- Not taking action on most things
- Discord building: willing to help, easy enough to do
- POS/payment processing: high friction to switch off Stripe (custom APIs); probably not actionable
- Referral income: interesting in concept, defer discussion
- Bookmaking: no interest
- Action item: research Taylor's actual credibility before going further
